case_title: ANITA CROTTY VS. TRAVESSE LIFESTYLE LIMITED, A FOREIGN CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROTTY, ANITA AS TO DEFENDANT TRAVESSE LIFESTYLE LIMITED, A FOREIGN CORPORATION TRAVESSE INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA PERFECT ESCAPES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA PERFECT ESCAPES $21,921.59 PRINCIPAL, $82.70 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $22,374.29, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
